body: Hey Amara, hope you had a good long weekend — wanted to ping you because I've been digging into [Meridian Grid](startups/meridian-grid) over the past few weeks and I think there's something real here. Their approach to distributed energy resource orchestration is genuinely differentiated, and the founding team has serious operational chops from their time at ERCOT and National Grid. I know [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) has been active in the grid-edge space this year, so I figured you'd want a look before they close out the round. They're raising a $4M seed, about 60% spoken for, and the lead is still open if you're interested in anchoring. Happy to make an intro to the CEO — she's sharp and I think you two would click. Let me know if you want the deck and I can have it over to you today.
